---
title: "QAQC Flags"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{QAQC Flags}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(dplyr)
```

When data is exported, each analyte will have an associated flag column which is used to determine what changes were made to the data. 

**The flag meanings are as follows:** 

```{r echo=FALSE, include=TRUE}
file <- system.file("extdata", "data-flags.csv", package = "SondePolishR")
flags <- read.csv(file)
colnames(flags) <- c("App Module", "Flag Code", "Flag Meaning")
knitr::kable(flags) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","bordered")) 
```
